query:
SELECT 
  emissorNome,
  codigoCetip,
  indexador,
  incentivado,
  CAST(taxaIndicativa AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as taxaIndicativa,
  CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as zspread,
  CAST(spreadIncentivadoSemGrossUp AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as spreadGrossUp
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE spreadIncentivadoSemGrossUp IS NOT NULL
  AND zspread IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 20;

SELECT 
  emissorNome,
  codigoCetip,
  indexador,
  incentivado,
  CAST(taxaIndicativa AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as taxaIndicativa,
  CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as zspread,
  CAST(spreadIncentivadoSemGrossUp AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as spreadGrossUp
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE spreadIncentivadoSemGrossUp IS NOT NULL
  AND zspread IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 20;
